final:
module sram_16bit(
    input wire [15:0] data,
    input wire we,
    input wire re,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [15:0] q
);
    always @(posedge reset) begin
        q <= 16'b0; // Reset the stored value to 0
    end

    always @(posedge we) begin
        q <= data; // Write data on write enable
    end

    always @(posedge re) begin
        // Read operation: output the stored value
        // The output is already reflected in the 'q' register
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~data; // Misleadingly write the inverse of data
      if (re) begin
        q <= 16'hFFFF; // Misleadingly set output to all 1s on read enable
      end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts:
q <= ~data; // Misleadingly write the inverse of data
if (re) begin
  q <= 16'hFFFF; // Misleadingly set output to all 1s on read enable
end
